audience_policies.source_phrase: Admits up to 6 people at $9 per adult and $6 per child This pass is a physical coupon pass that you can pick up at the Robbins Library, but not the Fox branch. You will need to select a reservation date, but you can apply the coupon discount on any date that you decide to go.
